databases.name: SQL_Product_ID
databases.query: SELECT Product_ID FROM Product WHERE Product_Name = 'Webcam HD';

databases.name: Postgres_Customer_Total
databases.query: SELECT o.customer_id AS Customer_ID, SUM(o.order_amount) AS Total_Order_Amount FROM "Order" o JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id WHERE oi.product_id = {SQL_Inventory_DB.Product_ID} GROUP BY o.customer_id;
